name: Iron Thunder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷鎚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いかづち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated on the field: Pay half your LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then destroy any other cards in the same column the destroyed card was in, that are in the Monster Zones or Spell & Trap Zones.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated on the field: Pay half your LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then destroy any other cards in the same column the destroyed card was in, that are in the Monster Zones or Spell & Trap Zones.

mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
